mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO place ( place_id, place_name, add1, add2, tel, content_type_id, map_x, map_y, first_image, lcls_systm1, lcls_systm2, lcls_systm3, radius_meters, created_at, updated_at, is_active ) VALUES
( #{place.placeId}, #{place.placeName}, #{place.add1}, #{place.add2}, #{place.tel}, #{place.contentTypeId}, #{place.mapX}, #{place.mapY}, #{place.firstImage}, #{place.lclsSystm1}, #{place.lclsSystm2}, #{place.lclsSystm3}, #{place.radiusMeters}, #{place.createdAt}, #{place.updatedAt}, #{place.isActive} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE place_name = VALUES(place_name), add1 = VALUES(add1), add2 = VALUES(add2), tel = VALUES(tel), content_type_id = VALUES(content_type_id), map_x = VALUES(map_x), map_y = VALUES(map_y), first_image = VALUES(first_image), lcls_systm1 = VALUES(lcls_systm1), lcls_systm2 = VALUES(lcls_systm2), lcls_systm3 = VALUES(lcls_systm3), radius_meters = VALUES(radius_meters), updated_at = VALUES(updated_at), is_active = VALUES(is_active)
mapper.select: SELECT place_id AS placeId, place_name AS placeName, add1, add2, tel, content_type_id AS contentTypeId, map_x AS mapX, map_y AS mapY, first_image AS firstImage, lcls_systm1 AS lclsSystm1, lcls_systm2 AS lclsSystm2, lcls_systm3 AS lclsSystm3, radius_meters AS radiusMeters, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt, deleted_at AS deletedAt, is_active AS isActive FROM place WHERE is_active = true ORDER BY place_id DESC

SELECT p.place_id AS id, p.place_name AS name, COALESCE(place_description.description, '') AS description, COALESCE(p.lcls_systm3, p.lcls_systm2, p.lcls_systm1, '') AS category, 0.0 AS rating, 0 AS reviewCount, 0 AS likes, p.map_y AS lat, p.map_x AS lng, CASE WHEN latest_congestion.score IS NULL THEN NULL WHEN latest_congestion.score REGEXP '^[0-9]+(\\.[0-9]+)?$' AND CAST(latest_congestion.score AS DECIMAL(5, 2)) BETWEEN 0 AND 30 THEN '여유' WHEN latest_congestion.score REGEXP '^[0-9]+(\\.[0-9]+)?$' AND CAST(latest_congestion.score AS DECIMAL(5, 2)) BETWEEN 31 AND 60 THEN '보통' WHEN latest_congestion.score REGEXP '^[0-9]+(\\.[0-9]+)?$' AND CAST(latest_congestion.score AS DECIMAL(5, 2)) BETWEEN 61 AND 100 THEN '혼잡' ELSE NULL END AS congestion, 'UNKNOWN' AS operationStatus, CASE WHEN v.place_id IS NULL THEN FALSE ELSE TRUE END AS isVisited, p.first_image AS imageUrl FROM place p LEFT JOIN visit v ON v.place_id = p.place_id AND v.member_id = #{memberId} LEFT JOIN ( SELECT place_id, MAX(description) AS description FROM place_quiz GROUP BY place_id ) place_description ON place_description.place_id = p.place_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cl.place_id, cl.score FROM congestion_log cl JOIN ( SELECT place_id, MAX(log_date) AS log_date FROM congestion_log WHERE is_active = TRUE GROUP BY place_id ) latest ON latest.place_id = cl.place_id AND latest.log_date = cl.log_date WHERE cl.is_active = TRUE ) latest_congestion ON latest_congestion.place_id = p.place_id WHERE p.is_active = TRUE
AND p.place_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%')
ORDER BY
CASE WHEN v.place_id IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC, p.place_name ASC
CASE WHEN latest_congestion.score REGEXP '^[0-9]+(\\.[0-9]+)?$' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC, CAST(latest_congestion.score AS DECIMAL(5, 2)) DESC, p.place_name ASC
( 6371000 * ACOS( LEAST(1, GREATEST(-1, COS(RADIANS(#{latitude})) * COS(RADIANS(p.map_y)) * COS(RADIANS(p.map_x) - RADIANS(#{longitude})) + SIN(RADIANS(#{latitude})) * SIN(RADIANS(p.map_y)) )) ) ) ASC, p.place_name ASC
p.place_name ASC
